title: Shadows Tonfas

---

This mod adds tonfas.

You can block with the tonfa but only if its in the off-hand.
recipes to make one is basically a side T shape of a material (other than netherite of course)
here is a example of what I mean:

![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1358341/description_bc5d0bb3-da23-457d-8b27-1af617e910cf.png)

---

Thanks, Harley for making the models and textures.
